shortDescription.default: Interactive SDLC Playbook for Lean-Agile Development

longDescription.default: Comprehensive interactive playbook covering Discovery, Build & Test, Continuous Deployment, Release on Demand, and Cross-Cutting Principles. Includes role-based filtering and 100+ tasks.
